rulings.Case Title: CAIRO INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. BANK OF THE WEST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Defendant Bank Of The Wests Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: The motion is granted, no opposition having been filed. Defendant is awarded $151,943.68 in fees and costs incurred in this litigation. The parties are directed to advise the other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) by 4:30 p.m. Wednesday, April 1, 2015, whether or not they plan to appear at the hearing to contest this tentative ruling.
